summary: Joel Spolsky posts a brief job listing seeking a freelance web designer in New York City to redesign Fog Creek Software's websites. He specifies requirements including strong XHTML/CSS skills, a portfolio of modern web designs, and some print experience. The post is essentially a classified ad rather than an essay.
key_points: Fog Creek was redesigning its web properties including fogcreek.com and copilot.com
Joel preferred hiring local freelancers in New York rather than remote or full-time designers
The required skill set combined web standards (XHTML/CSS) with print design experience
money_quotes: We need someone with strong xhtml/css skills, a history of making great looking, modern web sites, and some print experience.
key_insight: A brief job posting seeking a New York-based freelance web designer to redesign Fog Creek's web properties, notable mainly as a snapshot of mid-2000s web design hiring expectations.
